videos.headline: North Dakota State holds off Montana State to win FCS title
videos.description: North Dakota State closes out Montana State to win its first FCS national title since 2021.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (North Dakota State holds off Montana State to win FCS title) 2025/1/6

videos.headline: North Dakota State's Cam Miller dives into the end zone for a TD
videos.description: Cam Miller takes it himself and dives into the end zone for a touchdown to give North Dakota State a 7-0 lead vs. Montana State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (North Dakota State's Cam Miller dives into the end zone for a TD) 2025/1/6

videos.headline: To the house! Cam Miller takes it 64 yards for North Dakota State TD
videos.description: Cam Miller drives up the field and scores a 64-yard touchdown to put North Dakota State up 14-0 vs. Montana State

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (To the house! Cam Miller takes it 64 yards for North Dakota State TD) 2025/1/6

videos.headline: Bryce Lance extends North Dakota State's lead with a TD
videos.description: Cam Miller hands it off to Bryce Lance for a touchdown to extend North Dakota State's lead 21-3 heading into halftime vs. Montana State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Bryce Lance extends North Dakota State's lead with a TD) 2025/1/6

videos.headline: Scottre Humphrey scores Montana State's first TD of the game
videos.description: Scottre Humphrey scores a 1-yard rushing touchdown to help Montana State cut into North Dakota State's lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Scottre Humphrey scores Montana State's first TD of the game) 2025/1/6

videos.headline: Rolan Jones grabs a touchdown for Montana State
videos.description: Montana State's Tommy Mellott throws a 5-yard touchdown pass to Rolan Jones to make it a 21-18 game in favor of North Dakota State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Rolan Jones grabs a touchdown for Montana State) 2025/1/6

videos.headline: Cam Miller throws a TD pass to Joe Stoffel for North Dakota State
videos.description: Cam Miller throws a touchdown pass to Joe Stoffel to extend North Dakota State's lead to 28-18 in the fourth quarter vs. Montana State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Cam Miller throws a TD pass to Joe Stoffel for North Dakota State) 2025/1/6

videos.headline: Tommy Mellott takes off for a 44-yard TD for Montana State
videos.description: Tommy Mellott runs for an incredible 44-yard touchdown to make it a 28-25 game in favor of North Dakota State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Tommy Mellott takes off for a 44-yard TD for Montana State) 2025/1/6

videos.headline: CharMar Brown punches it in for a North Dakota State TD
videos.description: CharMar Brown scores a 3-yard rushing touchdown to extend North Dakota State's lead to 35-25 vs. Montana State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (CharMar Brown punches it in for a North Dakota State TD) 2025/1/6

videos.headline: Montana State stays alive with perfect pass for TD on 4th down
videos.description: Tommy Mellott throws a perfect 19-yard touchdown pass to Taco Dowler to make it a close 35-32 game in the fourth quarter in favor of North Dakota State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Montana State stays alive with perfect pass for TD on 4th down) 2025/1/6
